query: SELECT mapping_id, level, esrs_standard, esrs_topic, short_name, gs1_relevance FROM gs1_esrs_mappings LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT mapping_id, level, esrs_standard, esrs_topic, short_name, gs1_relevance FROM gs1_esrs_mappings LIMIT 5

rows.gs1_relevance: Product-level carbon footprint tracking using GTIN identification
Product composition tracking, packaging material identification

rows.short_name: Weight of products and product packaging, differentiating between technical and biological materials
rows.gs1_relevance: Product net weight, packaging weight attributes in GS1 WebVoc

rows.short_name: Weight of transport packaging, differentiating between technical and biological materials
rows.gs1_relevance: Transport packaging weight, PackagingMaterialTypeCode from GS1 WebVoc
